source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
A substance is found to have two phases, $N$ and $S$. In the normal state, the $N$ phase, the magnetization $M$ is negligible. At a fixed temperature $T<T_{\text{c}}$, as the external magnetic field $H$ is lowered below the critical field
\[
H_{\text{c}}(T)=H_{0}\left[1-\left(\frac{T}{T_{\text{c}}}\right)^{2}\right]\]
the normal state undergoes a phase transition to a new state, the $S$ phase. In the $S$ state, it is found that $B=0$ inside the material. The phase diagram is shown below. At $H \leq H_{0}$, compute the latent heat of transition $L$ from the $N$ to the $S$ phase. (Hint: one approach is to consider a "Clausius-Clapeyron" type of analysis.)
extraction_notes: image entries are in-memory PIL object representations rather than concrete file paths or URLs

issues: metadata.image_paths contains in-memory PIL object representations rather than concrete file paths or URLs

image_dependency: 题干明确写到 "The phase diagram is shown below"，且 `requires_image=true`、`text_dominant=false`，说明样本被上游标注为依赖图像。
但临界场公式 `H_c(T)=H_0[1-(T/T_c)^2]` 和关键物理条件 `B=0` 已在文字中给出，求潜热的主要计算可由文本完成，因此不打满分。
资产登记中有 2 张存在的图片文件，说明确有配图资源可用。
multi_step: 需要结合相图/相边界概念与热力学关系进行推导，而不是直接代入单一公式。
题干提示使用类似 Clausius-Clapeyron 分析，通常需要先建立相边界上的熵差与磁化差关系，再利用给定的 `H_c(T)` 求导并整理出潜热。
答案是温度依赖的解析式，表明解题过程包含多步符号推导与条件组合。
verifiability: 答案是明确的封闭形式短文本表达式，可直接做符号比对或等价变形核验。
`answer_present=true` 且 `answer_type=short_text`，便于后续规则或 CAS 型校验。
`registry_passed=true`，题干、答案、图片资产均已登记，整体可核验性较高。

risk_flags: metadata.image_paths contains in-memory PIL object representations rather than concrete file paths or URLs
题干包含配图引用，但核心计算信息大部分已在文字中给出，图像必要性可能弱于 `requires_image=true` 的标注

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和2张图片资产均已登记且存在，核心语义支撑完整
initial scoring 中 multi_step_score=0.84、verifiability_score=0.9，说明样本质量和可核验性较高
虽存在 metadata.image_paths 记录格式异常，但 image_manifest 中已有可用图片文件，当前更像元数据风险而非核心资产缺失
题干提及相图且配图已提供，同时关键计算信息也有文本支撑，适合进入候选池

candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text:
A substance is found to have two phases, $N$ and $S$. In the normal state, the $N$ phase, the magnetization $M$ is negligible. At a fixed temperature $T<T_{\text{c}}$, as the external magnetic field $H$ is lowered below the critical field
\[
H_{\text{c}}(T)=H_{0}\left[1-\left(\frac{T}{T_{\text{c}}}\right)^{2}\right]\]
the normal state undergoes a phase transition to a new state, the $S$ phase. In the $S$ state, it is found that $B=0$ inside the material. The phase diagram is shown below. candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集保留多解潜力评估，但不默认强推多解 agent。

extraction_notes: image entries are in-memory PIL object representations rather than concrete file paths or URLs
metadata.reasoning_chain:
Since
\[
S=-\left( rac{\partial G}{\partial T}ight)_{H}\]
we have
\[
 egin{aligned}
L & =T\left(S_{N}-S_{S}ight)=T\left[ rac{\partial\left(G_{S}-G_{N}ight)}{\partial T}ight]_{H}=- rac{T H_{\mathrm{c}}}{4 \pi}\left( rac{\partial H_{\mathrm{c}}}{\partial T}ight) \
& = rac{H_{0}^{2}}{2 \pi}\left( rac{T}{T_{\mathrm{c}}}ight)^{2}\left[1-\left( rac{T}{T_{\mathrm{c}}}ight)^{2}ight]\end{aligned}\]
